description:
Cross-platform fitting tool for EVE Online

Pyfa, short for python fitting assistant, allows you to create, experiment with, and save ship fittings without being in game. Open source and written in Python, it is available on any platform where Python 3 and wxWidgets are available, including Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Database:
- Updated for the Legion expansion
- Notes:
  - Harbinger Navy Issue gets malus to laser capacitor use instead of bonus (issue with CCP data)
  - Komodo has no damage bonus to XL missiles (issue with CCP data)
  - RR stacking penalization formula has been updated
Changes:
- Added bomb survivability stats panel (disabled by default, you can enable it in Preferences > Statistics Panel (#2501, thanks @StormDelay!)
- Added "Fill cargo with ..." context menu for cargo additions panel, which fills empty cargo space with selected item (#2673, thanks @NicolasKion!)
Fixes:
- Civilian missile launcher is now correctly treated as a missile launcher in graphs
